column1: どちらかというと、映画より本を読む方が好きだ。
column2: どちらかというと、えいがよりほんをよむほうがすきだ。
column3: If I had to say, I prefer reading books over watching movies.
column4: かというと ② (if I had to say / if anything, I'd say)
column5: どちらかというと / AかBかというと + [mild preference/lean] / AかというとA + (というわけでもないが)
column6: expressing a mild preference or tentative lean between options; 'if I had to choose, I'd say...'
column8: かというと② = mild preference (hedged); かというと① = provides causal explanation; むしろ = rather (clearer contrast); どちらかといえば = same meaning
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:かというと2 source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top1k complexity:standard
